title: QDC Quantum Tool
description:
A tool that changes shape according to the block you right click on.
To change it to sword mode, simply attack a mob with the tool in the main hand.
body:
This mod is about a tool that changes its shape according to the block you want to harvest. Right click on a block with a Quantum Tool in hand to change to the tool needed to break that block. To change it to sword mode, simply attack a mob with the tool in the main hand. (version 1.1) visit https://qdc-mod.com/pages/quantum_tool.html for recipes and more info. it has 4 modes: Shovel, Axe, Pickaxe and Sword mode.

Shovel Mode

Axe Mode

Pickaxe Mode

Sword Mode
